request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are quietly shifting defense spending to domestic priorities? While we're carrying the burden, others are cutting back. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that don't serve our interests. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
